title: Ludhiana, Punjab — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ludhiana, Punjab: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ludhiana is a city in Punjab with a population of 1,650,000. The industrial hub of Punjab, known for its bicycle, auto parts, and hosiery manufacturing, and vibrant Punjabi culture.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
